case_title: DALEY, MICHELLE COX vs. ROUSH, PATRICIA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DALEY, MICHELLE COX AS TO DEFENDANT ROUSH, PATRICIA IN HOME HEALTH, INC SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-02-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-05-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-13-1993

ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS: BENNETT, DICK W ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR DALEY, MICHELLE COX
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-02-1993, CONTINUED TO JUL-06-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLTF. MUST GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, ENTER JUDGMENT ON DEC-27-1993

ARBITRATOR'S AWARD SENT TO DEFAULT SECTION

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DALEY, MICHELLE COX RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROUSH, PATRICIA IN HOME HEALTH, INC $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF.
REJECTION OF AWARD MAILED TO SUPERIOR COURT ON 22-DEC-93 AND RECEIVED LATE BY MUNICIPAL COURT TODAY 05-JAN-94. NO ACTION TAKEN.
